description: Directory traversal vulnerability in framework/source/resource/qx/test/part/delay.php in QooxDoo 1.3 and possibly other versions, as used in eyeOS 2.2 and 2.3, and possibly other products allows remote attackers to read arbitrary files via ..%2f (encoded dot dot) sequences in the file parameter.
